string.text:
The M1 Garand is a semi-automatic rifle, developed in 1930s and adopted in 1936 as the service rifle of the US military. Widely considered the best service rifle of entire WWII - General Patton called it "the greatest battle implement ever devised" - it greatly increased the firepower of US infantry squads compared to typical squad of other countries, who used bolt-action rifles. Mechanically, M1 is a gas operated firearm, using a long-stroke gas piston system with rotating bolt. It is fed by a unique en-bloc clip holding 8 rounds.
 The Mod 1 is a variant made by the US Navy in 7.62x51.
 The Tactical variant includes polymer furniture instead of wooden, as well as a Picatinny rail on top of the handguard to mount optics.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: All for Picatinny/weaver (except of Red Dot Sights with low mount: Trijicon RMR, Leupold DeltaPoint PRO, Aimpoint T1 (low mount), Docter Sight, 1P76 Rakurs (low mount)
 %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: AAC 7.62 SDN-6

The M1 Garand is a semi-automatic rifle, developed in 1930s and adopted in 1936 as the service rifle of the US military. Widely considered the best service rifle of entire WWII - General Patton called it "the greatest battle implement ever devised" - it greatly increased the firepower of US infantry squads compared to typical squad of other countries, who used bolt-action rifles. Mechanically, M1 is a gas operated firearm, using a long-stroke gas piston system with rotating bolt. It is fed by a unique en-bloc clip holding 8 rounds.
 The M1 Garand is chambered in .30-06 Springfield round (7.62x63mm), the standard cartridge back then.
 The Tactical variant includes polymer furniture instead of wooden, as well as a Picatinny rail on top of the handguard to mount optics. This rifle is also chambered for 7.62x51.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: All for Picatinny/weaver (except of Red Dot Sights with low mount: Trijicon RMR, Leupold DeltaPoint PRO, Aimpoint T1 (low mount), Docter Sight, 1P76 Rakurs (low mount)
 %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: AAC 7.62 SDN-6
